fields.name: Source Item No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the item that you want to copy the data from.

fields.name: Target Item No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the new item that you want to copy the data to. \\To generate the new item number from a number series, fill in the Target No. Series field instead.

fields.name: Target No. Series
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number series that is used to assign a number to the new item.

fields.name: Number of Copies
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of new items that you want to create.

fields.name: General Item Information
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the selected data type is also copied to the new item.
